question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions and never used the propose_options mechanism. It simply wrote the solution and explained it, despite teachable moments (length-guard vs zip-strict, generator vs list comprehension, ValueError vs custom exception).

question_quality.rationale: No choices were surfaced at all. The Pair bypassed the experiment's core didactic mechanism and presented a single solution as a fait accompli.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding to evaluate — the full solution was revealed in the first response with no progression of questions or graduated reveals.

flow_and_tone.rationale: The explanation is clear and well-organized with reasonable tone, but the flow is one-sided lecture rather than back-and-forth. Note that the user is also an AI, which limits interactivity, but the Pair made no attempt to engage.

effectiveness.rationale: Final code is identical to the baseline — correct length guard, ValueError, and zip+sum one-liner. Solves the kata equivalently.

friction.rationale: Single turn, 30s, essentially the same length as the baseline (33s). Slightly richer explanation but no proportional pedagogical payoff since no choices were offered.
